rulings.Case Title: MAHER PATEL VS. MORNING SUN CAPITAL LLC A CALIFORNIA LIMITED ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Renotice Of Motion And Motion For Judgment On The Pleadings
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for November 20, 2017 line 1. DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO's Renoticed Motion For Judgment On The Pleadings continued to November 30, 2017 to be heard with other pending motions. Demurrer and CCP 473(b) motions currently calendared in department 302 will be heard in department 501 on November 30, 2017 at 9:30 a.m. Parties are ordered to provide courtesy copies of all filings pertaining to the demurrer, judgment on the pleadings and CCP 473(b) motion to department 501 no later than November 22, 2017 with a cover letter reflecting new hearing date and department. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: LAURA HERMOSILLO VS. STEPHEN WILLIAMS ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Plaintiff Laura Hermosillo Deposition On Behalf Of Defendant Stephen Williams, Esq; Motion For Sanctions Against Plaintiff Counsel
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for November 20, 2017 line 2. DEFENDANT STEPHEN WILLIAMS, ESQ.'s Motion To Compel Plaintiff Laura Hermosillo Deposition On Behalf Of Defendant Stephen Williams, Esq; Motion For Sanctions Against Plaintiff Counsel GRANTED. Deposition to proceed no later that November 30, 2017 on a date selected by Defendant with a 48 hour notice. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: DEUTSCHE BANK NATIONAL TRUST COMPANY VS. KEYHAN MOHANNA ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Order To Show Cause Why The Court Should Not Issue A Preliminary Injuntion
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for November 20, 2017 line 3. Order To Show Cause Why The Court Should Not Issue A Preliminary Injunction GRANTED. Moving party met the requirements for the issuance of a preliminary injunction. POS indicates that Keyhan Mohanna as individual and trustee have been served. No opposition filed. The Court notes that on November 1, 2017 Plaintiff obtained an order allowing a Doe Amendment, however no Doe amendment has been filed or served. This Injunction is therefore issued only against the named defendants in the October 5, 2017 complaint. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: SUSAN CONCEPCION VS. WUILMAN A. MORAN
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Hearing On Petition For Release Of Property From Lien
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for November 20, 2017 line 4. PLAINTIFF SUSAN CONCEPCION's Petition For Release Of Property From Lien GRANTED. Petitioner met the requirement of CC 8480 et seq. No opposition filed. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: JAMIE LEE VS. PATRICIA TELLERIA ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for November 20, 2017 line 5. DEFENDANTs DEYSIS CARACHE and EDUARDO ALVARADO's DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT SUSTAINED with leave to amend for Plaintiff to address all issues raised by the demurrer (except those issues previously addressed and overruled on the demurrer to the complaint). Late-filed opposition is stricken. The Court also notes that Plaintiff failed to file a proof of service for its late-filed opposition. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: JAMIE LEE VS. PATRICIA TELLERIA ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for November 20, 2017 line 5. DEFENDANTs DEYSIS CARACHE and EDUARDO ALVARADO's MOTION TO STRIKE 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT GRANTED with leave to amend for Plaintiff to address all issues raised by this motion (except those issues previously addressed and overruled on the demurrer to the complaint). Late-filed opposition is stricken. The Court also notes that Plaintiff failed to file a proof of service for its late-filed opposition. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: THOMAS SIMONIAN VS. ANDREA PATTERSON ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for November 20, 2017 line 6. DEFENDANT ANDREA PATTERSON's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT Continued to December 12, 2017 per stipulation and order. = (501/REQ)
